<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
blue_player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
print(f"Player position: {blue_player[0]['boundary']}")

# The image shows player at left side, middle height. Let me check the full maze structure
# to understand the path. Look at white corridors.
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nMaze structure (rows 18-30, cols 6-44):")
for i in range(18, 31):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][6:44]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
